1.content:
# Feature Flag Observability — nvidia-chatbot

DevCycle flag evaluations emitted via the OpenFeature OTel `TracingHook`. Data source: `feature_flag.evaluation` span events on `nvidia-chatbot` spans.

2.title: Total evaluations
2.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| expand span.events
| filter span.events[`span_event.name`] == "feature_flag.evaluation"
| summarize total = count()

3.title: Distinct flags evaluated
3.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| expand span.events
| filter span.events[`span_event.name`] == "feature_flag.evaluation"
| summarize distinct_flags = countDistinct(span.events[`feature_flag.key`])

4.title: Evaluation reasons
4.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| expand span.events
| filter span.events[`span_event.name`] == "feature_flag.evaluation"
| summarize evaluations = count(), by:{reason = span.events[`feature_flag.result.reason`]}
| sort evaluations desc

5.title: Evaluations by flag
5.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| expand span.events
| filter span.events[`span_event.name`] == "feature_flag.evaluation"
| summarize evaluations = count(), by:{flag_key = span.events[`feature_flag.key`]}
| sort evaluations desc
| limit 30

6.title: Evaluations over time
6.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| expand span.events
| filter span.events[`span_event.name`] == "feature_flag.evaluation"
| makeTimeseries evaluations = count(), by:{flag_key = span.events[`feature_flag.key`]}

7.title: Current value per flag
7.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| expand span.events
| filter span.events[`span_event.name`] == "feature_flag.evaluation"
| fieldsAdd flag_key = span.events[`feature_flag.key`],
            flag_value = span.events[`feature_flag.result.value`],
            evt_ts = span.events[`timestamp`]
| sort evt_ts desc
| dedup {flag_key}
| fields flag_key, flag_value, evt_ts
| sort flag_key asc

8.title: Evaluations by flag, value, and reason
8.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| expand span.events
| filter span.events[`span_event.name`] == "feature_flag.evaluation"
| summarize evaluations = count(), by:{flag_key = span.events[`feature_flag.key`], flag_value = span.events[`feature_flag.result.value`], flag_reason = span.events[`feature_flag.result.reason`]}
| sort evaluations desc
| limit 100
